## Goal
Improve the findability, clarity, and first-run experience of the public ISLES repository.

## Candidate tasks
- [ ] finalize GitHub About metadata
- [ ] publish GitHub Release notes for the interview snapshot
- [ ] add benchmark summary tables to detailed docs
- [ ] add external links after first public post

## Definition of done
- landing README stays value-first
- newcomers can run the smoke test first
- review artifacts are easy to find from the root page
